name: onboarding-sequence
description: Welcome emails, activation sequences, getting-started guides, first-run experiences
usage_hint: Use for welcome emails, activation sequences, getting-started guides, and first-run in-app messages. The audience just signed up and needs to reach their first value moment.

criteria.name: emotional-intelligence
criteria.description: New users are anxious; emotional warmth drives activation

criteria.name: customer-empathy
criteria.description: Onboarding must acknowledge where the user is starting from

criteria.name: call-to-action
criteria.description: Each onboarding step must have a single clear next action

criteria.name: email-craft
criteria.description: Onboarding emails set the tone for the entire user relationship

criteria.name: readability
criteria.description: New users are overwhelmed; simplicity accelerates activation

criteria.name: value-proposition-clarity
criteria.description: Reinforce why they signed up to prevent early churn

criteria.name: information-architecture
criteria.description: Sequential structure guides users through the activation path

criteria.name: brand-consistency
criteria.description: First impressions define the long-term brand relationship
